summary.key_theme: ServiceNow 積極擴展 AI 平台生態系與政府部門應用，但市場對 AI 帶來的勞動力市場衝擊及軟體股估值修正仍存有疑慮。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Launches New AI-Powered Government Solutions to Automate Public Sector Workflows
bullish.reason: 透過推出針對公共部門的 AI 自動化解決方案，擴大市場滲透率並鞏固其在大型企業軟體領域的領導地位。

bullish.title: ServiceNow AI Partnerships Test Mission Critical Role In Regulated Workflows
bullish.reason: 與 Aiva Health、Cohesity 等公司建立合作夥伴關係，證明其 AI 平台在高度監管環境下的關鍵任務處理能力。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Expands AI Platform As Shares Trade Below Analyst Valuations
bullish.reason: 推出 Autonomous Workforce 與 EmployeeWorks AI 產品，且股價處於分析師估值之下，具備潛在投資價值。

bullish.title: KONVERSATIONAL AWARDED SERVICENOW CRM PARTNER OF THE YEAR FOR THE AMERICAS REGION
bullish.reason: 獲得合作夥伴獎項顯示其 CRM 生態系在美洲地區的強勁成長與市場認可。

bullish.title: Prismforce Announces Agent-Based Talent Supply Chain Solution Built on the ServiceNow AI Platform
bullish.reason: 第三方開發商基於 ServiceNow AI 平台構建解決方案，進一步驗證了其平台作為開發基礎設施的價值。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Stock May Be Setting Up a Hidden Options Opportunity
bullish.reason: 技術面分析指出股價經過長期修正後出現轉機，可能為選擇權交易者提供機會。

bullish.title: $1000 Invested In ServiceNow 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
bullish.reason: 回顧過去十年的強勁報酬表現，有助於強化長期投資者的信心。

bullish.title: Cohesity and ServiceNow Deliver Real-Time Recovery for Enterprise AI Agents
bullish.reason: 與 Cohesity 合作提升 AI 代理的安全性與災難復原能力，增強企業級應用吸引力。

bearish.title: AI agents could easily send college grad unemployment over 30%, ServiceNow CEO says
bearish.reason: 執行長 Bill McDermott 對 AI 導致大學畢業生失業率飆升的言論引發市場對 AI 社會影響與監管風險的擔憂。

bearish.title: AI Disruption Concerns Hurt ServiceNow (NOW)
bearish.reason: 機構投資者對 AI 破壞性影響的擔憂導致市場對該股持謹慎態度，反映在 Q4 投資報告中。

bearish.title: Why ServiceNow Stock is Falling Today
bearish.reason: 分析師下調目標價導致投資人拋售，顯示市場對其短期成長動能的質疑。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
bearish.reason: 股價在市場上漲時逆勢下跌，顯示短期賣壓沉重。

bearish.title: Live On CNBC, ServiceNow CEO Says Don't Have Any Big Plans For Acquisitions Right Now
bearish.reason: 執行長明確表示目前無大型收購計畫，可能被市場解讀為成長策略轉趨保守。

bearish.title: Live On CNBC, ServiceNow CEO Says We Are Holding Our Own Headcount Flat
bearish.reason: 維持員工人數不變的策略反映了軟體產業在 AI 浪潮下的成本控管壓力。

neutral.title: Salesforce vs. ServiceNow: Which AI Stock Is a Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 同業比較分析，提供投資人不同觀點，未對股價產生直接影響。

neutral.title: Is It Time To Reassess ServiceNow (NOW) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
neutral.reason: 針對股價疲軟進行的投資評估，屬於中性市場觀察。

neutral.title: Is the Market Bullish or Bearish on ServiceNow Inc?
neutral.reason: 市場情緒調查，未提供具體利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: Unemployment could reach the mid-30s for college grads, says ServiceNow CEO Bill McDermott
neutral.reason: 此為與第一篇利空新聞重複之報導，選取 CNBC 較早發布的訪談內容作為代表。

neutral.title: Cohesity, ServiceNow Team Up To Make Enterprise AI Agents Crash-Proof
neutral.reason: 此為與 Cohesity 合作新聞之重複報導，已於利多類別中彙整。

neutral.title: ServiceNow And Aiva Bring Voice AI Deeper Into Hospital Workflows
neutral.reason: 此為與 Aiva Health 合作新聞之重複報導，已於利多類別中彙整。
